name: Subversive Bitcoin Acquisition Corp.
business: Subversive Bitcoin Acquisition Corp. is a blank check company formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses. Prior to completing a business combination, the company intends to use a portion of the offering proceeds to purchase and hold bitcoin as a treasury strategy. The company has not yet identified any specific business combination target and is not currently engaged in any substantive commercial operations.

exposures.sentence: Prior to our initial business combination, up to $10,000,000 (or $11,500,000 if the underwriters over-allotment option is exercised in full) of the proceeds we receive from this offering and the risk capital loan described in this prospectus will be used to purchase bitcoin.

catalysts.event: Consummation of initial business combination deadline
catalysts.sentence: We have 24 months from the closing of this offering to consummate our initial business combination.

tamClaims.claim: Bitcoin market capitalization was approximately $1.5 trillion as of March 2026.
tamClaims.sentence: As of March 2026, the total market capitalization of gold was approximately $35 trillion compared to approximately $1.5 trillion for bitcoin.
